audience: user with dirty CSV, nested JSON, null-heavy, or CDC-like local fixture needs
claim_boundary: Local fixture smoke coverage only; not a production data-quality, CDC/table-transaction, lakehouse, streaming, or performance claim.
expected_output_evidence: Benchmark rows and fixture metadata for the selected messy-data scenario with no fallback.
runnable_example: python benchmarks\traditional_analytics\run.py --engines shardloom --formats csv,jsonl --scenario "malformed timestamp / dirty CSV" --dataset-profile dirty_csv --rows 1000 --iterations 1 --output target\shardloom-dirty-csv-smoke.json --regenerate
title: Messy data fixture coverage
